title: Gritin LED Head Torch, [2 Pack] COB Headlamp Super Bright Headlight, Adjustable with 3 Modes, Lightweight for Running, Camping, Fishing
features: COB LED Technology: Advanced technology COB flashlight is much brighter and consumes less energy than conventional LED headlights. The use time in one battery can be extended by up to 80%. 30M irradiation range can be unobstructed in the dark environment, allowing you to walk without obstacles.

Adjustable & Comfortable: It can be adjusted according to the different head circumference for comfort. Just move the headlight up and down to adjust angle freely and the lamp beam angle can be up to 45°. The veneer position is super firm, not shaking, can meet needs in various lighting environment.

3 Adjustment Modes: One-click control 3 light emitting modes-high/low/strobe. Meet the lighting needs of different situations and people. Provide you with the strongest light in strong mode. Low mode provides illumination while avoiding fast power consumption. Strobe mode is especially useful when in an emergency.

Safe and Portable: The head torch can work safely and stably for a long time with high energy efficiency and low heat dissipation function. Portable headlamp weighs only 0.18lbs,which will free your hands.

Multifunctional Usages: Extremely right choice to adults and children used for jogging , cycling , camping, hiking and other long time night activities. 6 pcs AAA batteries are included for your convenience.
description: Product Description Batteries Included Comes with 6 AAA batteries, no need to buy your own, and they can be replaced at any time. Lightweight& comfortable Weighing just 0.18lbs, and the elastic headband allows you to wear it without any pressure. 45° Adjustable Our headlamp can be adjusted up to a maximum angle of 45°, allowing you focus the light where you need it.
